unresolved_items: The handling of `external_repos/repo_alpha/.ai/FEDERATION/peers.md` remains as a drafted proposal. It relies on its own `[ROOT]` and does not yet share a unified truth table with the central repository's Orchestrator.
execution_summary: Scanned the [ROOT]/AGNOSTIC-ORCH/knowledge/ directory to verify compliance with INTEGRITY_REFACTOR_PATCHSET_REPORT.md. Found legacy hardcoded `/.ai/` paths inside Layers 00 and 04. Drafted ADAPTER_PROPOSAL PROP-20260301-KB-REVALUATION and applied the required `[ROOT]/` path replacements across both constitutional files to fully support Layer 06's ROOT_POLICY.
